tasks.title: Align CodeWiki skill package with compiler and API contracts
tasks.summary: Update packaged CodeWiki skills and workflow assets so they route work through feedback, documentation, implementation, validation, graph, roadmap, build, and agency contracts without stale task-pack or nested-KB assumptions.

tasks.title: Implement gated-agency heartbeat controller
tasks.summary: Replace the heartbeat planning stub with a bounded agency controller that can advance roadmap work automatically through explicit token, time, risk, validation, policy, and approval gates.

tasks.title: Automate implementation-build handoff and publication prep
tasks.summary: Design and implement the post-task handoff flow so successful work produces compact resume context and implementation-build evidence suitable for commit, PR, issue, release, and push-readiness decisions without unsafe automatic publication.

tasks.title: Support tester and builder roles from documentation builds
tasks.summary: Add optional tester/builder workflow support so agent-created tests can be derived from documentation builds and roadmap work items before code implementation, without relying on legacy requirements packets.
